request_json.name: auto_si_confirmed
request_json.title: auto_si_confirmed
request_json.description: Answers the 412 auto-Sales-Invoice confirm: create the SI on completion.

request_json.name: auto_si_skip
request_json.title: auto_si_skip
request_json.description: Answers the 412 auto-Sales-Invoice confirm: complete the GD without an SI.

response_json.name: siId
response_json.title: siId
response_json.description: Sales Invoice auto-created on completion, when picking_setup.auto_completed_si = 1.

response_json.name: siFailed
response_json.title: siFailed
response_json.description: 1 = the GD completed but the auto Sales Invoice failed. Interactive callers get code 411 instead; headless ones (isPicking/isPacking) get 200 + this flag, because their caller treats any non-200 as fatal and would abort the picking run.

list.value: Unable to save as Created since Picking already being processed
"Save Goods Delivery as Created or create Picking manually to start picking process."

"Picking is not being completed yet. 
Proceeding will force complete picking process.

Would you like to proceed?"
Material not found or has been deleted

response_json.name: siConfirm
response_json.title: siConfirm
response_json.description: 412 = ask the user, 0 = nothing to ask

response_json.name: doAutoSi
response_json.title: doAutoSi
response_json.description: 1 = create the SI after the GD is saved
